Introducing ZAG .RS, the evil super computer bent on controlling all nanites.
Rex must offload all the nanites he's extracted before he explodes!
Van Kleiss himself pays a visit to NYC, and trouble is sure to follow!
An obsessed vigilante is out to kill every evo, especially Rex.
Rex must fight his way to freedom from inside one of Breach’s dimensions!
Providence and Van Kleiss race to rescue/kill a scientist who has the key to Rex's past!
The Chefs encounter live lobsters, snakes \u0026 alligators, get a visit from Animal Planet's Dave Salmoni, and cook exotic surf \u0026 turf dishes.
The Chefs are off to Florida for an unforgettable treasure hunt and then a tropical Luau in the Top Chef JR dining room!

programmes.t: An American Girl: Chrissa Stands Strong
programmes.d: When Chrissa moves to a new school in the middle of the year, she is greeted by the girls in her fourth-grade class with teasing and tricks.
Ben Tennyson is back from his summer vacation, and his life is mess!
To make money to buy a new toy, Andy and Rodney set up a cart to sell sandwiches.
When Andy's toy rocket gets stuck in the top of the tallest tree in the park, Rodney dusts off his long-dormant tree-climbing skills to retrieve it.
Rodney shows off his haggling expertise at the flea market, but before long he's given away all of Andy's money.
Rodney and Mr. J both want to help Andy win the melon-crate derby, but they want it so much that they forget to include him when they build their carts.
While on a camping trip with the Badger Scouts, Andy makes a fun new enemy--the annoying Kyle Finkster!
The other pets in the pet parade can do lots of cool, exciting tricks, which makes Rodney look bad.
After Rodney is accidentally left behind while the Johnson's are on vacation, he goes to bunk with Leon in the wild.
Rodney and Mr. J become managers of rival baseball teams, but neither will let Andy play.
Andy and Rodney have a falling out and hold auditions to find new best friends.
Andy and Rodney compete to be the faces of Furlock, a new pet hair gel from international hair icon and fancypants, Manzio.
Andy and Rodney are determined to stay up all night in order to see the legendary Yellow Flash in the sky.
Building a pool in the backyard would wreck Leon's tree, which is the last thing Rodney wants.
An accident strands Rodney on a deserted island. Except it's the kind of 'island' you find in the street.
The night before he's to give an important speech, Mr. J loses his voice while laughing too hard at a silly singing cow movie that Rodney insisted he watch.
Andy tries to bridge the gap between Rodney and his father through the timeless art of karaoke.
Rodney's attempt to fix the air conditioner goes terribly wrong, leaving him trapped in the walls of the house.
Rodney's special time at the circus with Darlene is ruined by the arrival of Rodney's Cousin Eddie.
Andy is practically blind after losing his glasses, but all his other senses suddenly start working much better.
When a cereal box provides the location of buried treasure, Andy and Rodney must make peace with their arch-enemies Kyle and Salty Mike to dig it up.

Rodney enlists Leon and Darlene to join The Rod Squad, whose heroic mission is to prevent Andy from getting in trouble with Mrs. J. After donning ridiculous outfits and infiltrating a sticky bun warehouse, things start to get very silly.
Rodney really is the perfect pet... until the arrival of Archie, a rabbit who REALLY is the perfect pet.

Much to his delight, Rodney learns he is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to. Much to his chagrin, Mr. J learns Rodney is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to.
It's Andy's birthday, and wouldn't you know it, what with all the lounging and the resting and the napping, Rodney totally forgot!
Andy thinks being a pet is easy. Rodney thinks being a pet owner is easy. To prove they're both wrong, they switch!
Andy and Rodney seek the advice of Grandpa Squirrel to get out of a dangerous dare.
An orphan is spirited away to a magical land, where he finds both fun and dangers, and discovers his destiny — to become the hero who will be known as Peter Pan.
This star-packed extravaganza brings the comic book legend to the big screen where an infant superhero is sent to Earth just as his home planet, Krypton, explodes.
The final three chefs must work some magic to create dishes for an event supporting Alex's Lemonade Stand Fund and earn their spot in the finale.
The final two chefs create dishes based on their past, present and future and the winner is crowned Top Chef Jr!

Before the season 2 premiere, go behind the scenes in this special episode for an exclusive look at how 12 chefs are chosen to compete in Top Chef Junior! Last season, Top Chef Junior brought together the best young chefs in the country for a culinary competition like no other. For season 2, out of more than a thousand young hopefuls, 23 have been chosen to fly to Los Angeles for the final audition. We’ll meet them all and learn about their exciting journey as they prove themselves through 2 days of intense challenges designed to measure their skills and hunger for competition. Only the most talented will make the cut and compete in Top Chef Junior season 2. Chef \u0026 Head Judge Curtis Stone hosts.

programmes.t: Harry Potter And The Prisoner Of Azkaban
programmes.d: Harry, Ron and Hermione return as teenagers for a third term at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry and must face a dangerous convict.

programmes.t: Harry Potter And The Goblet Of Fire
programmes.d: A competition will be held between three schools of wizardry. The Goblet of Fire makes its final selection for the competition - Harry Potter.
When Daniel and Ruby move to the orchard home inherited from Daniel’s eccentric uncle, it seems inhospitable - until Ruby discovers a magic well.
A wish involving a librarian, a treasure map and a new perspective all help Ruby discover that her love of helping others comes from her late mom.
Ruby gets an intimidating wish about an extended Emerald family with secrets and surprises. Will she and her friends find the courage to grant it?
A wish about trust causes a serious trust issue between Daniel and Ruby, too. Meanwhile, Daniel learns secrets about his dad that he never knew.
Daniel struggles to understand his daughter’s new vocation. Ruby embarks on a scientific wish that helps bring them both to a meeting of the minds.
The final three chefs must work some magic to create dishes for an event supporting Alex's Lemonade Stand Fund and earn their spot in the finale.
The final two chefs create dishes based on their past, present and future and the winner is crowned Top Chef Jr!

When a successful executive suffers a crisis of confidence and his career is at stake, he finds the solution to his problems in his daughter’s imaginary world.
When Lumpus discovers that Raj has a precious cheese wheel from India, Lumpus tries everything within his power to eat the cheese himself.
Someone is pulling down the pants of all the campers, and Lazlo is terrified that he might be next!
Lumpus' favorite holiday is ruined when the Jelly Beans can't stop trick or treating.
The Jelly Beans create a doll out of canned meat that comes to life and terrorizes the camp.
Raj's dream of turning the camp store into something special is tested.
Jane Doe decides to throw a Miss Fru Fru Pageant, but the Squirrels Scouts are not even sure what being 'Fru Fru' means.
Rodney really is the perfect pet... until the arrival of Archie, a rabbit who REALLY is the perfect pet.

Much to his delight, Rodney learns he is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to. Much to his chagrin, Mr. J learns Rodney is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to.

Providence and Van Kleiss race to rescue/kill a scientist who has the key to Rex's past!

Po must train a new warrior when he's chosen to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.
The sequel to the comedic blockbuster continues to follows Max and gang as they take on new adventures and find the courage to become their own heroes.
When the Jellies discover that Lumpus' parents did not come to visit him at Camp, they try to set things right.
When the doctor orders Slinkman to take a Hawaiian vacation, Lumpus does everything possible to stop it.
Edward will stop at nothing to prevent the Jellies from discovering he has a doll.
On the hottest day of the year, an air conditioner falls from the sky and brings out the worst in the campers at Camp Kidney.
The Jellies rip a hole in Lumpus' prized tent and will do anything to keep Lumpus from discovering the secret.
At the grocery store, Rodney feeds Andy some food samples that Andy is allergic to, causing him to bloat up like a giant ball.
To boost his best chum's spirits, Rodney lets Andy win a round of their favorite game, Flying King Footloaf.
Mr. J and Andy exclude Rodney from their club, so he hangs out with Mrs. J's ladies group.
Cousin Eddie visits Rodney to make amends for years of being a jerk.
Rodney invites Darlene over for a date.
Ruby helps bring a long-kept secret to light and changes a life. Daniel meets a business developer interested in Emerald whom he tries to win over.
Rex and co. must rescue Providence agents who are trapped in a savage secluded evo hotspot.
Noah convinces Rex to be his wingman on prom night, but Rex must split his time fighting an evo.

Fifteen of the competition’s fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal – however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances. Back to basics. It’s going to be a true slug-match to see who has the skills and who has the drive to take the one thing that has eluded them all… the title of Top Chef! Padma Lakshmi, Tom Colicchio, and Gail Simmons return as judges and joining them as the first guest judge of the season is legendary Chef, Jeremiah Tower. Marcus Samuelsson, Nancy Silverton, Michael Cimarusti, Josiah Citrin, Suzanne Goin, Caroline Styne share the table for the high-powered, high-stress beach-side meal.
Jack Black is Po, the unlikely hero chosen to fulfill an ancient kung fu prophecy in this delightful animation voiced by a star-studded cast.

12 young chefs enter the Top Chef Junior kitchen to kick off the second season. As they celebrate \u0026 get to know each other better, Host Vanessa Lachey \u0026 Head Judge Curtis Stone reveal a surprise Quickfire Challenge: The chefs must make one perfect bite, but there’s a shocking twist! For their first Elimination Challenge, the chefs must cook for the Top Chef Junior Food Festival and the competition is tough! Food festivals are a great opportunity to showcase talent and make a mark in the culinary world, but it's a difficult task when there are so many choices available and every chef is putting their best foot forward. The top 12 must each present a dish they hope stands out from the crowd.

programmes.t: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1
programmes.d: Robert Townsend and Denzel Washington lend their voices to this Caribbean-style version of the tale about a strange little man who can spin straw into gold.

programmes.t: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1
programmes.d: Sinbad is the voice of the lonely, enchanted frog who longs for the love of a princess. With Danny Glover, LeVar Burton and Jay Leno.
Jack Black is Po, the unlikely hero chosen to fulfill an ancient kung fu prophecy in this delightful animation voiced by a star-studded cast.
When the Jellies discover Slinkman used to be an amazing stuntman, they do all they can to restore him to his former glory.
The Jellies want a submarine for the lake, and they try to raise the money to buy one.
When Lumpus pulls a prank on the bean scouts, it completely backfires and he ends up at their mercy.
Edward and Lazlo go head to head in a battle for better belching!
Lumpus becomes paranoid when he thinks Lazlo has discovered his secret handshake.
The Beans Scouts and the Squirrel Scouts go skiing, and Lazlo and Lumpus discover that the mountain isn't big enough for the both of them.
Andy and Rodney must clean Mrs. Flatbottom's slug room.
When Mr. \u0026 Mrs. J leave town, Andy and Rodney must stay with the Finksters.
Andy and Rodney launch Mr. J's prized bowling trophy into the neighbor's yard.
Andy decides it's time to start saving for the future.
Andy and Rodney challenge Kyle and Salty Mike to a treehouse building competition. Things get out of hand. Need I say more?
The Emerald Apple Festival is back and so is a mysterious wish from the town’s festive past. Daniel and Paula revive the traditional apple cart race.
Providence encounters a street gang of teenage evos and are shocked to discover that Rex was once a member!
The evil computer ZAG RS returns to take control of all nanites in this nail-biting outer space adventure!

This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold’s last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold’s friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station. Noted food writer and personal friend of Jonathan Gold, Ruth Reichl serves as guest judge alongside Padma, Tom and Gail.
A villain’s plans to steal the moon are foiled when he encounters the immense will of three little orphaned girls who look at him as a potential Dad.

Most of the chefs are very familiar with the main ingredient for this Quickfire Challenge: instant ramen! But Host Vanessa Lachey and Guest Judge Sheldon Simeon aren’t looking for the 5-minute version. Instead, the chefs have access to all the ingredients in the Top Chef Junior pantry to put their own spin on this popular dish. For their Elimination Challenge, the chefs are woken up by a surprise knock at their door and discover it's time to get cracking on a scrumptious brunch dish they’ll cook in their own rooms and serve to the judges on a roof top terrace!

programmes.t: Hard Times: Lost On Long Island
programmes.d: Featuring Long Islanders who lost their jobs in the Great Recession, this documentary looks at the realities of long-term, white-collar unemployment in America.

programmes.d: San Diego's top rated newsman gets threatened by a new female employee with ambition to burn.

programmes.d: Drained from her life in the city, a young cellist moves to a quiet small town, where she encounters an old friend who helps her heal and remake herself.

An ordinary man who has never known love, struggles to talk to his crush who goes to work on the same bus as him every day. Things started to change when he acquires a strange perfume that has the power to attract women...
A former detective grants permission to a freelance video journalist to cover his revenge journey on a mob boss whom previously killed his partner during an investigation.

programmes.t: The Witch: Part 2 The Other One
programmes.d: A mysterious girl survived a blood raid in a secret lab found herself being tracked down by a group of assassins.
Do-woon has just been ordained. A man admits to killing his mother during confession. Torn between his duty as a priest and his desire for revenge as a son, he faces a demonic group...
A woman finds it difficult to shake off her ex-convict label, until she meets a girl whom she is determined to save.
Hot-shot police detective Lee is out to get a hit-and-run driver and discovers the driver is his long-lost girlfriend from ten years ago. He tries to protect her before her crime record accumulates.

programmes.t: Dr. Cheon And The Lost Talisman
programmes.d: Dr. Cheon is a fake exorcist who cannot see or hear any ghosts. One day, a woman comes to Dr. Cheon, asking him to save her possessed younger sister...
In 1908, Ahn Jung-geun and Korean independence fighters win against Japanese army. A year later, they head to Harbin as the Japanese statesman Uto Hirobumi is going for negotiation...
Detective Ryu lost his beloved son in a hit-and-run accident. As the statute of limitations passed without finding the criminal, he ran into the murderer of his son.
Detonation of an explosive device causes terror in the flight and pilot Gyu-Sik loses sight in one eye. Yong-dae who hatched the hijacking plot, threatens to take the plane to North Korea.

The movie follows In-yong, an ever-optimistic girl who loses her mother in a car accident, struggles to stay strong on her own. As she is kicked out because of her overdue rent, she finds support from her teacher, her classmate and a pharmacist friend to overcome hardship.

Chul-soo, the son of notorious criminals, falls for Young-hee, a detective. To win her father's approval, he vows to pass the police exam. As their wedding approaches, his parents try to sabotage his future while Young-hee investigates a serial murder case, and Chul-soo uses his family's skills to help.
When an Olympic gold medalist boxer met a young boxer who falls victim to match fixing, he vows to start a boxing team at the school he teaches at and give his student a shot at the nationals.
While the Kingdom of Korea is under occupation by the Japanese, an old and experienced hunter is challenged by the hunt of the last tiger in the country.
King Sejong desires to create an original alphabet for his people. With the help of others, they struggle to create the Korean alphabet Hangul.
After an accident, a talented songwriter transforms into a messenger of love by connecting people who having trouble finding love and expressing their feelings.
While a zombie-virus breaks out in South Korea, passengers including a father and young daughter, a couple, and several students struggle to survive on the train from Seoul to Busan.
A doctor tries to woo a grieving, widowed firefighter in her attempt to get him to testify on her behalf in a medical malpractice case.
A man framed for murder battles a game planner who is intent on turning a city into one giant game board that he can control.

An astronaut is left stranded in space because of an accident during a spaceflight. The former director of the space centre strives to bring him home safely...

A couple moved to a new house, dreaming of a peaceful country life. But they face a terrifying reality due to their neighbor, who visits them at the same time every day with just silence….

Eun-yi is hired as a nanny in an lavish mansion by businessman Hoon and his pregnant wife, Hae-ra. When Eun-yi is seduced by the father of the house, she becomes the unwitting victim in a series of traps laid by the women of the house. Eun-yi must now outwit and escape the vicious family to protect her sanity and her life.

An ace in the barge business makes money by selling his name, is falsely accused of embezzling billions. He fights to reclaim his stolen life from those tied to him solely by name.

Yun-ho, born weak and destined to die young, is drawn to his loyal friend, Jae-un. In the conservative Joseon Dynasty, Yun-ho disguises as a girl to confess his love to Jae-un before his arranged marriage.
Woo-jin is the newly appointed manager of a girls' volleyball team which is going to disband. The new owner sold all ace players for money and asked the team to win at least once.
A man framed for murder battles a game planner who is intent on turning a city into one giant game board that he can control.

A nobleman who has passed the national civil service exam, meets the self-proclaimed best chef in Joseon, falls into the world of gourmet food and sets out to find the life he truly wants.

Two bears from the Institute of techonolgy have turned into humans after eating garlic and mugwort. Yet, one has grown up into a police, while one has become a gangster...
Yong-jun is working as a delivery man when he meets and instantly falls for Yeo-reum, the devoted sister of a gifter deaf swimmer. Yeo-reum slowly opens her heart to warm-hearted Yong-jun.
Yeong-Ho is a famous influencer who praises living a single life. Hyeon-Jin is an editor who is desperate about finding her partner. The two meets while working together for a book.

A housekeeper is charged with murder. Her attorney is surprised to learn the only witness to the crime is a teenage girl with Asperger's. Will the girl be able to provide a valid statement?

Toby, Claire, and Blinky work to keep the human world unaware of Jim’s absence as they look for ways to rescue him from the Darklands.
When Jim is imprisoned in the Darklands, Blinky tries to decipher the Amulet to save him while Claire, Toby, and NotEnrique race to recover the Killahead Bridge before it's too late.
Toby gets secret transmissions through his headgear and his friends decide they need to infiltrate; meanwhile, Jim forms an unlikely alliance.
Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders discover a mysterious object filled with secrets during their search for Dagur the Deranged.
Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders journey to Glacier Island in search of the Snow Wraith, a fearsome dragon that holds key to the Dragon Eye's mysteries.
The Dragon Riders discover a lush island that turns out to be the home of the Deathsong, a massive dragon that threatens to trap them forever.

programmes.t: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programmes.d: After the events of the Boss Baby 2 film, adult businessman Theodore Templeton is framed for embezzling from his company and forced to revert back to his old Boss Baby self and crash with his brother Tim. But to pull this off, he'll need to win over Tim's family into letting him stay, and convince Baby Corp to give him back his old job... which is currently held by his baby niece Tina.

programmes.t: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programmes.d: Tina and Boss adjust to co-boss responsibilities while on a mission to rescue the baby with the best hair in the world from a lice outbreak. With opposing leadership views, the two split the existing field team's focus and discover a new archenemy in Lumpy the Park Duck.

programmes.t: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programmes.d: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programmes.t: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programmes.d: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programmes.t: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programmes.d: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as \"The Beast.\" Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

When an unexpected kitten shows up on Boss Baby’s doorstep, they go head to head against the feline enemy.
Julien finds a bag of coffee beans in the Cove of Wonders and gets the entire lemur community hooked on caffeine.
When Gran moves into the cave with The Croods, she drives Grug nuts and embarrasses Eep in front of the first-ever group of cool kids.

programmes.t: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programmes.d: Boss searches for evidence that Tabitha's best friend is an Uncuddleable, but is sidetracked by a Templeton Family tradition: \"The War of the Cheeks\", a Go Fish tournament where the winner gets to make family rules for a whole day. When Yvette joins in, Boss has to keep her from winning, out of fear that an evil babysitter will make family rules that overturn the Templeton household.

programmes.t: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programmes.d: Trying to win Tabitha's loyalty for Baby Corp, Boss and Tina invite her to Techy Tykes, a technology convention at their office. But when the top-secret UBO goes missing, the outsiders Tabitha and Tim (who's tagged along to relive his glory days) immediately become the number one suspects.
Hunk and Coran search for a new power crystal on a living planet inhabited by an alien race imprisoned by Zarkon. Back at the Castle, Pidge sabotages Sendak's efforts to steal Voltron.
Team Voltron responds to a distress call and stops to help a stranded band of freedom fighters on the run from Zarkon.
When Lucky and Pru find themselves on opposing teams for a school fundraiser their competitive streaks emerge and their friendship is tested.

You see there was a time when Frog didn't croak. Frog sang like a bird… and the birds didn't like it. Birds were the masters of song and that's the way it should be! So the birds trick poor old Frog into a singing duel and sing and sing and sing… until poor old Frog's voice is reduced to a rebbit. Tales from Africa.

You see there was a time when Spider didn't have a tiny waist. She was all big and round… and did she like her food! One day greedy Spider hears of Four Feasts in Tinga Tinga and she wanted to go to them all! So she spun four threads and attached them to various animals going to the feasts. But the Monkeys, Frog, Hippo and the Bees all set off in different directions – North, South, East and West – and Spider's thread soon runs out. EEeeek! The threads get tighter and tighter and tighter, making Spider's smaller and smaller and smaller! Luckily the threads break, but from that day on Spider has always had a tiny waist. Tales from Africa.

Conrod is visiting Silver Hatch to try out some new bio fuel.  But Big Chris fears something is wrong with it after he comes out in spots after sampling a smoothie made from the same produce.  What or who could be at fault?
The cars are having a football tournament down at the beach.  FB learns that if he relaxes, his natural footballing skills will shine through.
Mr Carburettor is off to try out his new wetsuit at the beach… it may come in useful when rain is forecast for the big race the next day!
Mr Carburettor is planning a big firework display up at the farm.  Can Roary help Tin Top overcome his fear of bangs in time for the  display?
Mr Carburettor has demanded pizza for lunch but the pizzeria is closed.  How is Marsha going to ensure Mr Carburettor gets the lunch he asked for?

Roary is feeling put out as all the cars are paying Conrod too much attention.  He is determined to show his worth when they race that afternoon.  But tries too hard and ends up in danger.  Who can save him?

Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.
When the other dragons come down with the flu, Summer must overcome her fear of eels to retrieve the cure and get her friends back in the air.
The Dinotrux builds a garage where the Reptools can be safe, but D-Structs tries to thwart their efforts by pitting them against one another.
Ty Rux leads the Dinotrux on a nighttime raid to rescue Ton-Ton who's been snatched by a pack of Scraptors and taken to their hive in Scraptor Valley.

programmes.t: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programmes.d: After a baby says a swear word on live television (censored by child-friendly online filter Sheriff Potty Pardner), Boss becomes obsessed with proving that the baby was taught this filth by their new arch-nemesis, Lumpy the Park Duck. Meanwhile, Tina's search to find what that swear word means creates unintentional havoc for both Tabitha's research paper and for Baby Corp's online systems when Sheriff Potty Pardner gives them an \"internet time out\".

programmes.t: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programmes.d: After Boss insults Tina's imaginary friend, he's forced into \"Imaginary Friend Sensitivity Training\" at Baby Corp. Boss makes up his own imaginary friend to get out of these meetings, but after Tina gets a whiff that he may be lying, he's forced to keep up the charade at work and at home.

programmes.t: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programmes.d: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books.

programmes.t: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programmes.d: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire.
Eep has the first pen pal in Gulp Gorge/Gran sends Ugga and Eep on the first treasure hunt when she decides to pass on her inheritance.
Eep and Thunk become obsessed with a new trend known as “quicktogramming”/Grug accidentally causes the first outbreak of a “super bug”.
After Aunt Cora moves out, Lucky tries to live a life without rules.
Mega Fat CEO Baby holds a game day at Baby Corp and Boss Baby must find a way to beat Mega Fat CEO Baby at his own game.
Mort becomes jealous when King Julien's wish for a little brother finally comes true after his parents adopt a socially awkward Aye-Aye named Brodney.
When Grug and Ugga leave the kids alone on date night, Eep throws the first-ever house party that rages out of control and almost destroys the cave.

programmes.t: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programmes.d: The kids must leave Po to escape into the forest and head back to Panda Village to prepare against Jindiao.

programmes.t: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programmes.d: Puss misses the old days adventuring with his buddy Jack Sprat. Fearful he will leave San Lorenzo, Dulcinea concocts a super special adventure surprise with the orphans. But Jack Sprat shows up with the promise of a damsel in distress… who turns out to be a super scary monster.
After Aunt Cora moves out, Lucky tries to live a life without rules.
Mega Fat CEO Baby holds a game day at Baby Corp and Boss Baby must find a way to beat Mega Fat CEO Baby at his own game.
Mort becomes jealous when King Julien's wish for a little brother finally comes true after his parents adopt a socially awkward Aye-Aye named Brodney.
When Grug and Ugga leave the kids alone on date night, Eep throws the first-ever house party that rages out of control and almost destroys the cave.

programmes.t: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programmes.d: The kids must leave Po to escape into the forest and head back to Panda Village to prepare against Jindiao.

programmes.t: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programmes.d: Puss misses the old days adventuring with his buddy Jack Sprat. Fearful he will leave San Lorenzo, Dulcinea concocts a super special adventure surprise with the orphans. But Jack Sprat shows up with the promise of a damsel in distress… who turns out to be a super scary monster.
Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death.
When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape.
Eager to return to normal life, Jim struggles with re-adjusting as he leads the Trollhunting team to track down three Goblins that escaped the Darklands.
On an island that will make the perfect outpost, the Dragon Riders discover its indigenous residents are a mysterious new breed of dragon.
Thinking he's allergic to Meatlug, Fishlegs gets hypnotized – and wakes up transformed into an invincible warrior known as Thor Bonecrusher.
When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programmes.t: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programmes.d: After a baby says a swear word on live television (censored by child-friendly online filter Sheriff Potty Pardner), Boss becomes obsessed with proving that the baby was taught this filth by their new arch-nemesis, Lumpy the Park Duck. Meanwhile, Tina's search to find what that swear word means creates unintentional havoc for both Tabitha's research paper and for Baby Corp's online systems when Sheriff Potty Pardner gives them an \"internet time out\".

programmes.t: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programmes.d: After Boss insults Tina's imaginary friend, he's forced into \"Imaginary Friend Sensitivity Training\" at Baby Corp. Boss makes up his own imaginary friend to get out of these meetings, but after Tina gets a whiff that he may be lying, he's forced to keep up the charade at work and at home.

programmes.t: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programmes.d: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programmes.t: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programmes.d: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programmes.t: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programmes.d: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the “keys” in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.
After Aunt Cora moves out, Lucky tries to live a life without rules.
Mega Fat CEO Baby holds a game day at Baby Corp and Boss Baby must find a way to beat Mega Fat CEO Baby at his own game.
Mort becomes jealous when King Julien's wish for a little brother finally comes true after his parents adopt a socially awkward Aye-Aye named Brodney.
When Grug and Ugga leave the kids alone on date night, Eep throws the first-ever house party that rages out of control and almost destroys the cave.
